repo_prior_art.cite: none; API.md §3 ExactID/PartialID catalogues are empty seed areas

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL: counterfactual means may be identified without unique proximal bridges; BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT: strongly identified functionals of weakly identified nuisances

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue proximal regularization selector result

published_prior_art.cite: DarollesFanFlorensRenault2011Econometrica and Horowitz2014ARE: Tikhonov/regularization for ill-posed inverse problems; BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT: penalized nuisance limits under weak identification

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy: shared proxy-null mediation geometry only; eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator: mediator-coupling proxy bounds; q1_spectral_phase_transition: panel/FWL phase threshold

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL + BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT cover nonunique/weak bridges and strongly identified functionals; the finite two-native-objective tau threshold is not found but is a value-level frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest in-catalogue artifacts do not study SPD quadratic selector ranges on proximal bridge fibers

published_prior_art.cite: DarollesFanFlorensRenault2011Econometrica and Horowitz2014ARE motivate regularization; KallusMaoUehara2021MinimaxNC studies minimax negative-control learning; no verified source gives the SPD-exposed-point ATE range claim

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no banked binary negative-control regularizer-dependence witness

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoGengTchetgen2018Biometrika and ShiMiaoNelsonTchetgen2020JRSSB use finite/categorical proxy rank structures for point identification, not a penalty-dependent binary witness

novelty_flags.label: Proposal tier
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the current kernel is a finite population value/selector frontier, not an asymptotic equivalence frontier with same influence function, same identified set, or same efficiency bound between two named published estimators.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Bennett et al. 2023, 'Minimax Instrumental Variable Regression and L2 Convergence Guarantees without Identification or Closedness', a closer comparator for minimax regularization under nonidentification/closedness failure.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Upgrade Conjecture 1 into a true two-estimator frontier: name the Cui proximal OR/DR estimator and the Kallus-Mao-Uehara minimax estimator, then make tau_native separate same influence function/identified set/efficiency bound from strict non-equivalence.
Add the missed Bennett et al. minimax-IV convergence paper and explicitly state what its nonidentification/regularization limit results do and do not imply for proximal ATE selector ranges.
Give an explicit observable LP/QP recipe for tau_native and for detecting SPD-exposed ATE values, so the threshold is visibly computable rather than only defined by endpoints.
Strengthen the binary witness by adding a finite latent proximal realization certificate for the displayed law, not only the observable bridge algebra.

recommended_next_step: Revise for the flagship floor by either proving a genuine asymptotic equivalence/non-equivalence frontier between named estimators or lowering the novelty target to field.
